meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build a SaaS starter kit to overcome the no portfolio trap. A beginner-level tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code for career growth.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by shipping a functional SaaS starter kit. By using Antigravity for rapid boilerplate generation and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform abstract theory into a tangible, production-ready asset that proves your engineering competence to potential employers and sets you apart instantly.
content.intro:
The job market doesn't care about your GPA; it cares about what you've shipped. You sit there with a head full of syntax and empty GitHub contributions, watching the 'no experience' wall loom larger every day. The industry is tired of generic clones, but it is starving for developers who can bridge the gap between an idea and a deployed URL.

This isn't just a tutorial; it's your tactical pivot. We are going to bypass the months of boilerplate frustration by leveraging high-leverage AI tools. You aren't just writing code; you are building a professional-grade SaaS engine that serves as undeniable proof of your ability to execute, debug, and deliver.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Architecture
steps.description: Establish the foundational stack. Focus on a modular architecture that separates auth, database, and UI logic for maximum scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modern SaaS starter kit architecture using Next.js 14, Supabase for auth/db, and Tailwind CSS. Include a folder structure that supports feature-based routing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project with nextjs, supabase, and tailwind based on the architect plan'

steps.title: Bootstrap Authentication Flow
steps.description: Implement secure user management. This is the heartbeat of any SaaS application and a critical skill for any portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a protected route middleware and a user sign-up/login component that integrates with Supabase Auth.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement supabase auth flow with redirects to dashboard'

steps.title: Database Schema Design
steps.description: Structure your data to be extensible. A well-designed schema is the hallmark of a senior-level perspective.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational schema for a SaaS user profile, subscription status, and a basic resource table using Prisma.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create prisma schema with User, Subscription, and Project models'

steps.title: UI Component Integration
steps.description: Build the dashboard interface. Focus on clean, responsive design patterns that make the app feel premium.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard layout with a sidebar navigation, data table for projects, and a profile settings card.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'build dashboard layout using shadcn/ui components'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Move from local to live. A portfolio project is worthless if it isn't accessible via a public URL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Vercel deployment configuration that enables automatic builds on Git push.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure vercel.json and verify production build process'

pro_tips: Always document your 'why' in the README; recruiters value your decision-making process over the code itself.
Use mock data generation scripts to make your dashboard look 'lived-in' during demos.
Implement one complex feature, like Stripe integration or real-time webhooks, to demonstrate depth beyond basic CRUD.
Keep your commit history clean; individual, descriptive commits show you understand professional version control.
Focus on accessibility (a11y) early; it is a 'hidden' skill that signals a high-quality, professional engineering mindset.
content.next_steps: After deploying your starter kit, add one custom feature unique to your interests, write a blog post explaining the architecture, and link the live site prominently on your LinkedIn and resume.
content.conversion_block: You now have the foundation to build anything. Stop waiting for permission to be a developer and start defining your own technical identity. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
